pairs.en: Thank you for your question. Next question is from the line of Brent Bracelin with Piper Sandler. Your line is now open.
pairs.zh:
谢谢你的提问。下一个问题来自Piper Sandler的Brent Bracelin。请提问。

Thank you for your question. Next question is from the line of Brent Bracelin with Piper Sandler. Your line is now open.

pairs.en: Brent Bracelin--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Brent Bracelin——分析师  
Brent Bracelin--Analyst

pairs.en: Afternoon. Mike, happy to learn, you're not leaving anytime soon here. We'll save the congrats. But I did want to ask you a question around product growth.
pairs.zh:
下午好。Mike，很高兴得知你不会很快离开这里。我们把祝贺留到以后。但我确实想问你一个关于产品增长的问题。

Afternoon. Mike, happy to learn, you're not leaving anytime soon here. We'll save the congrats. But I did want to ask you a question around product growth.

pairs.en: The guide implies an acceleration for the first time into the second half in three, three and a half years. What's driving the optimism on acceleration? Is it all new products? Or are you feeling better about consumption activity across the base?
pairs.zh:
该指引暗示，在三到三年半的时间里，首次在下半年出现加速。是什么推动了加速的乐观情绪？完全是新产品吗？还是您对整体消费活动感到更加乐观？

The guide implies an acceleration for the first time into the second half in three, three and a half years. What's driving the optimism on acceleration? Is it all new products? Or are you feeling better about consumption activity across the base?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: It's both. The core of our business is very strong, coupled with the new products that we see that will be going into production. Also, on top of, I'm pleased with the muscle we've been building on new customer acquisitions, and that's going to start to kick in. in the second half of the year.
pairs.zh:
两者都是。我们业务的核心非常强劲，再加上我们看到的即将投入生产的新产品。此外，在此基础上，我对我们在获取新客户方面积累的实力感到满意，这将在下半年开始发挥作用。

It's both. The core of our business is very strong, coupled with the new products that we see that will be going into production. Also, on top of, I'm pleased with the muscle we've been building on new customer acquisitions, and that's going to start to kick in. in the second half of the year.

pairs.en: We do get a lot of visibility into our existing customers with planned migrations that they have. And I think that is looking very good for the second half of the year. And remember, our guidance for Q1 seems low, but that is because of the -- that we miss one business day because of leap year, and that's a fair chunk of revenue that comes out of that when you're looking at that growth rate just in Q1.
pairs.zh:
我们对现有客户的计划迁移有很高的可见度。我认为这对下半年来说看起来非常好。请记住，我们对第一季度的指引看起来较低，但这是因为——由于闰年我们少了一个工作日，而当你只看第一季度的增长率时，这会影响相当大的一部分收入。

We do get a lot of visibility into our existing customers with planned migrations that they have. And I think that is looking very good for the second half of the year. And remember, our guidance for Q1 seems low, but that is because of the -- that we miss one business day because of leap year, and that's a fair chunk of revenue that comes out of that when you're looking at that growth rate just in Q1.

pairs.en: Brent Bracelin--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Brent Bracelin——分析师  
Brent Bracelin--Analyst

pairs.en: Helpful color there. And then Sridhar, just as you think about growth levers to the business, one area you flagged was this idea of Snowflake's role in AI-powered advertising. You clearly know the advertising market well. I never really thought of the large ad market as a meaningful opportunity for Snowflake.
pairs.zh:
有用的补充。接着，Sridhar，当你思考业务的增长杠杆时，你提到的一个领域是Snowflake在AI驱动的广告中所扮演的角色。你显然非常了解广告市场。我从未真正认为庞大的广告市场对Snowflake来说是一个有意义的机遇。

Helpful color there. And then Sridhar, just as you think about growth levers to the business, one area you flagged was this idea of Snowflake's role in AI-powered advertising. You clearly know the advertising market well. I never really thought of the large ad market as a meaningful opportunity for Snowflake.

pairs.en: Can you just double-click into when you think about the AI-powered ad market, is there an unlock that you see there for Snowflake in that kind of new workload scenario? Thanks.
pairs.zh:
你能再详细谈谈，在你看来，在AI驱动的广告市场中，Snowflake是否会在这种新工作负载场景下迎来增长机会？谢谢。

Can you just double-click into when you think about the AI-powered ad market, is there an unlock that you see there for Snowflake in that kind of new workload scenario? Thanks.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: We've actually been in this area for -- in the area of marketing and advertising for a fairly long time. There are tons of CDP, start-ups, and others that custom CDP that people build customer data platforms on top of Snowflake. In fact, we acquired a company called Samooha because data clean rooms are a really powerful enabling technology for things like conversion lift. And part of what we facilitate in this role as like a ecosystem player is automating even more operations.
pairs.zh:
我们实际上已经在营销和广告领域深耕了相当长的时间。有大量的CDP、初创公司以及其他定制化CDP，人们在Snowflake之上构建客户数据平台。事实上，我们收购了一家名为Samooha的公司，因为数据清洁室（data clean rooms）对于转化提升（conversion lift）这类应用来说是非常强大的赋能技术。而作为生态系统参与者，我们在其中促进的一部分工作就是实现更多运营的自动化。

We've actually been in this area for -- in the area of marketing and advertising for a fairly long time. There are tons of CDP, start-ups, and others that custom CDP that people build customer data platforms on top of Snowflake. In fact, we acquired a company called Samooha because data clean rooms are a really powerful enabling technology for things like conversion lift. And part of what we facilitate in this role as like a ecosystem player is automating even more operations.

pairs.en: We talked last time about this idea called AI SQL, which is what are the primitives you can put into SQL such as that image analysis, video analysis can be done very easily by analysts, so you can ask questions like does putting a Christmas tree into the ad increase the click-through or the conversion rate of an ad that you show over the holidays? And so, I think like as we introduce multimodal capabilities into Cortex, I think the lens of what is achievable with Snowflake will continue to expand. And of course, with language models, with AI models in general, the generative applications, how can you generate creative. How can you generate copy for creators. Those are also areas that become easier and easier to do.
pairs.zh:
我们上次讨论了AI SQL这个概念，即如何将一些原语嵌入到SQL中，使得分析师能轻松进行图像分析、视频分析。例如，你可以问：在广告中加入圣诞树是否会提高节假日期间广告的点击率或转化率？我认为，随着我们向Cortex引入多模态能力，Snowflake能实现的功能范围将继续扩大。当然，借助语言模型和AI模型，生成式应用如何帮助创作者生成创意文案等方向也会越来越容易。

We talked last time about this idea called AI SQL, which is what are the primitives you can put into SQL such that that image analysis, video analysis can be done very easily by analysts, so you can ask questions like does putting a Christmas tree into the ad increase the click-through or the conversion rate of an ad that you show over the holidays? And so, I think like as we introduce multimodal capabilities into Cortex, I think the lens of what is achievable with Snowflake will continue to expand. And of course, with language models, with AI models in general, the generative applications, how can you generate creative. How can you generate copy for creators. Those are also areas that become easier and easier to do.

pairs.en: And so, that's our broad role. It's an important vertical, both marketing and advertising for Snowflake. But I think the arc is moving more from measurement and privacy-preserving technology to also generative technologies that can power more automated testing, and like things like auto AI measurement using Snowflake.
pairs.zh:
所以，这就是我们的广泛角色。这是Snowflake的一个重要垂直领域，涵盖营销和广告。但我认为，趋势正从测量和隐私保护技术转向生成式技术，这些技术能够支持更自动化的测试，以及像利用Snowflake进行自动AI测量之类的事情。

And so, that's our broad role. It's an important vertical, both marketing and advertising for Snowflake. But I think the arc is moving more from measurement and privacy-preserving technology to also generative technologies that can power more automated testing, and like things like auto AI measurement using Snowflake.

pairs.zh:
Brent Bracelin——分析师  
Brent Bracelin--Analyst

pairs.en: Thank you.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。
Thank you.

pairs.en: Yes. we'll have it.
pairs.zh:
是的，我们会有的。  
Yes. we'll have it.

pairs.en: Alex Zukin--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Alex Zukin——分析师

Alex Zukin--Analyst

pairs.en: Sridhar, maybe just on looking at the spend intensity in your market, it seems like something has changed to the positive over the past six months. It seems like it's gotten better. You've been meeting with a lot of customers. Mike mentioned the tech and financial services verticals outperforming.
pairs.zh:
Sridhar，可能仅从你所在市场的支出强度来看，过去六个月似乎发生了积极的变化，情况有所好转。你一直在与许多客户会面。Mike提到科技和金融服务垂直领域表现优于其他。

原文：Sridhar, maybe just on looking at the spend intensity in your market, it seems like something has changed to the positive over the past six months. It seems like it's gotten better. You've been meeting with a lot of customers. Mike mentioned the tech and financial services verticals outperforming.

pairs.en: But maybe can you talk to how much of this is a broader demand environment versus sales execution improvements versus confidence in kind of like better product innovation velocity, releasing of new products? Anything you can do there I think would be helpful.
pairs.zh:
但或许你可以谈谈，这其中有多少是源于更广泛的需求环境、销售执行改进，还是对更快产品创新速度和新产品发布的信心？任何你能做的分析我认为都会有所帮助。

But maybe can you talk to how much of this is a broader demand environment versus sales execution improvements versus confidence in kind of like better product innovation velocity, releasing of new products? Anything you can do there I think would be helpful.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Well, you know how this works. Positive feedback cycles like feed on themselves. But I would say, in my mind, the pretty substantial changes that we've made in how we operate as a company, absolutely. First is around product velocity.
pairs.zh:
嗯，你知道这是怎么回事。像这样的正反馈循环会自我强化。但在我看来，我们在公司运营方式上做出的相当重大的改变，绝对是有的。首先是产品速度方面。

Well, you know how this works. Positive feedback cycles like feed on themselves. But I would say, in my mind, the pretty substantial changes that we've made in how we operate as a company, absolutely. First is around product velocity.

pairs.en: I think if you look at the pace, of how we've been able to get AI products out to market, I think it's been remarkable. But there's a lot more innovation that is happening. We have a big effort around AI-powered migrations that you will hear more about. We have invested heavily in data collaboration and sharing with release of things like an internal marketplace for our data.
pairs.zh:
我认为，如果你看看我们将AI产品推向市场的速度，就会发现这已经非常惊人了。但还有更多的创新正在进行中。我们在AI驱动的迁移方面投入了大量精力，未来你会听到更多相关消息。我们还在数据协作与共享方面进行了大量投资，例如推出了内部数据市场等功能。

原文：I think if you look at the pace, of how we've been able to get AI products out to market, I think it's been remarkable. But there's a lot more innovation that is happening. We have a big effort around AI-powered migrations that you will hear more about. We have invested heavily in data collaboration and sharing with release of things like an internal marketplace for our data.

pairs.en: Lots of new products in the data engineering space, including Iceberg. So, from that perspective, I think we are just feeling more confident about who we are and obviously expanding the aperture of what is possible. Previously, it used to be that people would have to bring their data into Snowflake to get something done. But with things like Iceberg, we can take care of that right off the bat without any need for movement.
pairs.zh:
数据工程领域涌现了许多新产品，包括Iceberg。因此，从这个角度来看，我认为我们对自身的定位更加自信，同时也在不断拓展可能性的边界。过去，人们必须将数据导入Snowflake才能完成工作。但有了Iceberg这样的产品，我们几乎可以立即处理，无需任何数据迁移。

原文：
Lots of new products in the data engineering space, including Iceberg. So, from that perspective, I think we are just feeling more confident about who we are and obviously expanding the aperture of what is possible. Previously, it used to be that people would have to bring their data into Snowflake to get something done. But with things like Iceberg, we can take care of that right off the bat without any need for movement.

pairs.en: I think product velocity is one part. But to what Mike was talking about, I think there is an awareness of the use case life cycle of the discipline needed to understand where we can create value for our customers, map it out in a thoughtful way and then engage in a fairly I would say, constant or constant conversation about what are the best places our account teams and our customers can come to a shared understanding of the projects that we should be working on. Anything that area is becoming more and more of a science where we are able to say what the best people and the team do and have more folks to be more like them. I think there's just a maturity when it comes to use case prosecution.
pairs.zh:
我认为产品速度是其中的一部分。但就Mike所谈到的而言，我觉得我们需要认识到这门学科中用例生命周期的重要性，从而理解我们能在何处为客户创造价值，深思熟虑地进行规划，然后我认为可以说，持续不断地探讨：我们的客户团队和客户在哪些最佳领域能够对应该推进的项目达成共识。这一领域正越来越像一门科学，我们能够识别出最佳人员与团队的做法，并让更多人效仿他们。我认为，在用例执行方面，我们现在已经更加成熟。

I think product velocity is one part. But to what Mike was talking about, I think there is an awareness of the use case life cycle of the discipline needed to understand where we can create value for our customers, map it out in a thoughtful way and then engage in a fairly I would say, constant or constant conversation about what are the best places our account teams and our customers can come to a shared understanding of the projects that we should be working on. Anything that area is becoming more and more of a science where we are able to say what the best people and the team do and have more folks to be more like them. I think there's just a maturity when it comes to use case prosecution.

pairs.en: I think the third piece which is what gives us confidence about new products is then how all of these come together in how things are multiplexed over from the product team to the sales team. I mean at the end of the day, it's unreasonable for Christian or I to expect that one salesperson is going to know about the 400 things that we launched last year is just not a thing. And so, we increasingly have specialist teams that know what it is to take, for example, clean rooms to the two dozen most important customers that they must reach this year, say, compared to pretty much all of our customers who we think can benefit from key data engineering features our key AI features. I think it is that maturity and the ability to take the right feature to the right customer to create value that I think positions us overall better.
pairs.zh:
我认为第三点，也是让我们对新产品充满信心的原因，在于所有这些元素如何结合在一起，从产品团队到销售团队的传递方式。我的意思是，归根结底，要求Christian或我指望一个销售人员了解我们去年推出的400种产品是不合理的，这根本不可能。因此，我们越来越多地建立专业团队，他们知道如何将例如clean rooms这样的产品推向今年必须接触的二十多个最重要的客户，而不是推向我们认为可能受益于关键数据工程功能和关键AI功能的几乎所有客户。我认为，正是这种成熟度，以及将合适的功能带给合适的客户以创造价值的能力，使我们整体上处于更有利的位置。

原文：
I think the third piece which is what gives us confidence about new products is then how all of these come together in how things are multiplexed over from the product team to the sales team. I mean at the end of the day, it's unreasonable for Christian or I to expect that one salesperson is going to know about the 400 things that we launched last year is just not a thing. And so, we increasingly have specialist teams that know what it is to take, for example, clean rooms to the two dozen most important customers that they must reach this year, say, compared to pretty much all of our customers who we think can benefit from key data engineering features our key AI features. I think it is that maturity and the ability to take the right feature to the right customer to create value that I think positions us overall better.

pairs.en: And the final thing that I'll add on here is that we've also cleaned up how we work with partners, definitely ISVs, but also system integrators. And I think you will see more progress on that side as well. So, we are very proud that our ISV partners like relational AI our Qumu are, of course, Blue Yonder with whom we have a fairly deep partnership or succeeding along with Snowflake. So, it's a multifaceted effort, but they build on the same core perimeters great product, a sales team that knows how to execute at scale and an ability to thoughtfully overlay new things that we should be doing on what is a very large sales force.
pairs.zh:
最后我想补充的一点是，我们还优化了与合作伙伴的合作方式，尤其是独立软件供应商（ISV），也包括系统集成商。我相信你们很快会看到这方面的更多进展。我们对此非常自豪，比如我们的ISV合作伙伴relational AI、Qumu，以及与我们有着深度合作的Blue Yonder，当然还有Snowflake，都在与我们一起取得成功。这是一项多层面的工作，但它们都建立在相同的核心基础之上：优秀的产品、具备规模化执行能力的销售团队，以及在一支庞大的销售队伍中，审慎地融入我们应当推进的新业务。

And the final thing that I'll add on here is that we've also cleaned up how we work with partners, definitely ISVs, but also system integrators. And I think you will see more progress on that side as well. So, we are very proud that our ISV partners like relational AI our Qumu are, of course, Blue Yonder with whom we have a fairly deep partnership or succeeding along with Snowflake. So, it's a multifaceted effort, but they build on the same core perimeters great product, a sales team that knows how to execute at scale and an ability to thoughtfully overlay new things that we should be doing on what is a very large sales force.

pairs.en: Alex Zukin--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Alex Zukin——分析师

Alex Zukin--Analyst

pairs.en: Super helpful and really clear. Mike, maybe one for you, while we still have you. The guide for next year, it does seem like it's starting. I think you've gotten this question in a few different ways.
pairs.zh:
非常有帮助且非常清晰。Mike，也许有一个问题想问你，趁你还在。明年的指南，看起来似乎已经开始。我想你已经以几种不同的方式被问过这个问题了。

Super helpful and really clear. Mike, maybe one for you, while we still have you. The guide for next year, it does seem like it's starting. I think you've gotten this question in a few different ways.

pairs.en: It's starting at a stronger place than if I look at a year ago. If we look a year ago, when you were incorporating maybe some Iceberg risk. So, to the extent that you can put finer point on that confidence that you have to put that guide out there, again, implying some acceleration. You mentioned some -- Sridhar mentioned some new products potentially ramping in the second half from a contribution standpoint.
pairs.zh:
它从一个比一年前更强的起点开始。如果我们回顾一年前，当时你或许考虑了一些Iceberg风险。因此，就你能够更精确地定位那份信心而言，你必须发布那个指引，再次暗示某种加速。你提到了一些——Sridhar提到了一些新产品可能在今年下半年从贡献角度开始增长。

It's starting at a stronger place than if I look at a year ago. If we look a year ago, when you were incorporating maybe some Iceberg risk. So, to the extent that you can put finer point on that confidence that you have to put that guide out there, again, implying some acceleration. You mentioned some -- Sridhar mentioned some new products potentially ramping in the second half from a contribution standpoint.

pairs.en: How do we think about Iceberg as a tailwind or a headwind in that guide? How do we think about NRR stabilization at 126% in the context of that guide. Any finer point you put on it?
pairs.zh:
我们如何看待Iceberg在该指引中是顺风还是逆风？在该指引背景下，我们如何看待NRR稳定在126%？您对此有什么更细致的看法吗？

How do we think about Iceberg as a tailwind or a headwind in that guide? How do we think about NRR stabilization at 126% in the context of that guide. Any finer point you put on it?

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. First of all, I think NRR is pretty stable. I'm not saying it's not going to go to 125% or 124%, but I don't really see it. It's going to be in the mid-120s is what we are predicting.
pairs.zh:
是的。首先，我认为 NRR 相当稳定。我不是说它不会达到 125% 或 124%，但我并不认为会这样。我们预测它将保持在120%中段。

原文：
Yeah. First of all, I think NRR is pretty stable. I'm not saying it's not going to go to 125% or 124%, but I don't really see it. It's going to be in the mid-120s is what we are predicting.

pairs.en: In terms of Iceberg, we're really now seeing Iceberg as more of a tailwind than a headwind as we -- it's opening up so much more data for us. We've yet to see massive amounts of data move out of Snowflake. Yeah, there has been some, but storage remains at roughly 11% of our revenue. And we are seeing workloads that otherwise wouldn't have been accessible to Snowflake.
pairs.zh:
关于Iceberg，我们现在确实认为它更多是顺风而非逆风——它为我们开辟了更多数据来源。我们尚未看到大量数据从Snowflake迁出。是的，确实有一些，但存储营收仍约占我们总收入的11%。而且我们正在看到那些原本无法在Snowflake上运行的工作负载。

In terms of Iceberg, we're really now seeing Iceberg as more of a tailwind than a headwind as we -- it's opening up so much more data for us. We've yet to see massive amounts of data move out of Snowflake. Yeah, there has been some, but storage remains at roughly 11% of our revenue. And we are seeing workloads that otherwise wouldn't have been accessible to Snowflake.

pairs.en: So, I think that's good. And our guide is based upon the strength of what we're seeing with customer commitments. And as I said before, we've done a really good job this year. There's still room for improvement always and there will always be room for improvement.
pairs.zh:
所以，我认为这很好。我们的指引基于我们在客户承诺中看到的强劲表现。正如我之前所说，今年我们做得非常好。总是有改进的空间，而且永远都会有改进的空间。

So, I think that's good. And our guide is based upon the strength of what we're seeing with customer commitments. And as I said before, we've done a really good job this year. There's still room for improvement always and there will always be room for improvement.

pairs.en: But I think we're getting much better at working with customers to identify new workloads that will go into production that gives us that confidence.
pairs.zh:
但我认为我们越来越擅长与客户合作，识别新的工作负载，这些工作负载将投入生产，从而给我们带来这种信心。

But I think we're getting much better at working with customers to identify new workloads that will go into production that gives us that confidence.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Just to add on what Mike said, which is, I've said this before, the Iceberg story is one that Snowflake can write. We've made all the right investments in the format how broadly it is getting adopted. And yes, while there will be some customers who might want to move data that is instantly over to Iceberg. There is vastly more opportunity for us to take Snowflake to where the data is.
pairs.zh:
补充一下Mike所说的，我之前也说过，Iceberg的故事是Snowflake可以谱写的。我们在该格式的广泛采用方面进行了所有正确的投资。是的，虽然会有一些客户可能希望立即将数据迁移到Iceberg，但我们有更大的机会将Snowflake带到数据所在之处。

Just to add on what Mike said, which is, I've said this before, the Iceberg story is one that Snowflake can write. We've made all the right investments in the format how broadly it is getting adopted. And yes, while there will be some customers who might want to move data that is instantly over to Iceberg. There is vastly more opportunity for us to take Snowflake to where the data is.

pairs.en: And that's what I mean when I say this is our history to write. And that's what we are in the process of doing. We have had success with a number of data engineering use cases. We think that there are a lot of data analytics use cases to also go after, and that's the exciting opportunity that has opened up for us.
pairs.zh:
这就是我所说的“这是我们要书写的历史”的意思。而这正是我们正在做的事情。我们在多个数据工程用例上取得了成功。我们认为还有很多数据分析用例值得去探索，而这正是摆在我们面前的激动人心的机遇。

And that's what I mean when I say this is our history to write. And that's what we are in the process of doing. We have had success with a number of data engineering use cases. We think that there are a lot of data analytics use cases to also go after, and that's the exciting opportunity that has opened up for us.

pairs.en: Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product
pairs.zh:
Christian Kleinerman--产品执行副总裁  

Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product

pairs.en: And I'll add that I think on Iceberg, we've shifted from theoretical to actual consumption, actual revenue coming already materialized into us.
pairs.zh:
我要补充的是，我认为在Iceberg上，我们已经从理论上的消费转变为实际的消费，实际的收入已经实实在在地进入了我们手中。

And I'll add that I think on Iceberg, we've shifted from theoretical to actual consumption, actual revenue coming already materialized into us.

pairs.en: Alex Zukin--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Alex Zukin——分析师

Alex Zukin--Analyst

pairs.en: Congrats to you, guys. Thanks, again.
pairs.zh:
恭喜你们，伙计们。再次感谢。
Congrats to you, guys. Thanks, again.

pairs.zh:
操作员
Operator

pairs.en: Thank you for your question. Next question is from the line of Mark Murphy with J.P. Morgan. Your line is now open.
pairs.zh:
感谢您的提问。下一位提问者来自J.P. Morgan的Mark Murphy。现在请提问。

Thank you for your question. Next question is from the line of Mark Murphy with J.P. Morgan. Your line is now open.

pairs.en: Sonak Kolar--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Sonak Kolar--分析师

Sonak Kolar--Analyst

pairs.en: Great. Thank you for taking the question. This is Sonak Kolar on for Mark Murphy, and I echo the congrats. Sridhar, curious to get your take on a couple of the major recent industry developments, one being DeepSeek models and the other being the large-scale data center build-outs with Stargate of $100 billion to $500 billion, and now Meta announcing the $200 billion project.
pairs.zh:
好的。感谢您提问。我是替Mark Murphy参会的Sonak Kolar，也同表祝贺。Sridhar，想听听您对近期几个重大行业动态的看法，一是DeepSeek模型，二是大规模数据中心建设，涉及1000亿美元到5000亿美元的Stargate项目，以及Meta刚宣布的2000亿美元项目。

Great. Thank you for taking the question. This is Sonak Kolar on for Mark Murphy, and I echo the congrats. Sridhar, curious to get your take on a couple of the major recent industry developments, one being DeepSeek models and the other being the large-scale data center build-outs with Stargate of $100 billion to $500 billion, and now Meta announcing the $200 billion project.

pairs.en: How would you think through the direct and kind of indirect opportunities for Snowflake with that much data in motion? For instance, DeepSeek usage in Cortex or some of the broader data management or data integration needs as your customers start to tap into those services? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
您如何看待Snowflake随着如此大量流动数据所带来的直接和间接机会？例如，当您的客户开始使用DeepSeek在Cortex中的功能，或是更广泛的数据管理和数据集成需求时，会带来哪些机会？谢谢。

How would you think through the direct and kind of indirect opportunities for Snowflake with that much data in motion? For instance, DeepSeek usage in Cortex or some of the broader data management or data integration needs as your customers start to tap into those services? Thank you.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: This is a pretty dynamic space, which seems to change pretty dramatically every three months. But in as much as DeepSeek is interesting, I think the work that xAI is doing and Grok 3 and what it is capable of is equally interesting. I think we are definitely headed to a world in which there are now several players. It's not two any longer that are leading the charge when it comes to the world's innovations with AI.
pairs.zh:
这是一个非常有活力的领域，似乎每三个月就会发生巨大变化。但尽管DeepSeek很有趣，我认为xAI正在做的工作以及Grok 3及其能力同样引人入胜。我确信我们正走向一个拥有多个参与者的世界——在全球AI创新方面，已不再只有两家在领跑了。

原文：
This is a pretty dynamic space, which seems to change pretty dramatically every three months. But in as much as DeepSeek is interesting, I think the work that xAI is doing and Grok 3 and what it is capable of is equally interesting. I think we are definitely headed to a world in which there are now several players. It's not two any longer that are leading the charge when it comes to the world's innovations with AI.

pairs.en: And the fact that it is a healthy combination of open-source models, as well as proprietary model, we think is a good thing. As I said, our value comes from our customers being able to bring all of their data together into one place and drive more and more value with it. And what our partnerships with the leading model makers of the world indicates is an implicit acknowledgment that we have a big role to play in this world of AI. And so, what we are doing is building the best products that can take advantage of the data gravity that we have and access to the biggest, best models that there are on the planet.
pairs.zh:
我们认为，开源模型与专有模型的健康结合是一件好事。正如我所说，我们的价值来源于客户能够将所有数据整合到一个地方，并从中挖掘越来越多的价值。我们与全球领先模型制造商的合作，也隐含着一种认可：我们在AI领域扮演着重要角色。因此，我们正在构建最佳产品，以充分利用我们拥有的数据引力，并接入全球最大、最优秀的模型。

And the fact that it is a healthy combination of open-source models, as well as proprietary model, we think is a good thing. As I said, our value comes from our customers being able to bring all of their data together into one place and drive more and more value with it. And what our partnerships with the leading model makers of the world indicates is an implicit acknowledgment that we have a big role to play in this world of AI. And so, what we are doing is building the best products that can take advantage of the data gravity that we have and access to the biggest, best models that there are on the planet.

pairs.en: Absolutely. I think there is a belief on the part of many, especially the ones that can afford it that there are more breakthroughs to be had by investing hundreds of millions of dollars. I mean, sadly or not. That's not us.
pairs.zh:
当然。我认为许多人，尤其是那些有能力承担的人，相信通过投资数亿美元可以取得更多突破。我的意思是，无论可悲与否，我们不是那样的人。

Absolutely. I think there is a belief on the part of many, especially the ones that can afford it that there are more breakthroughs to be had by investing hundreds of millions of dollars. I mean, sadly or not. That's not us.

pairs.en: But I feel very happy about our ability to work with these folks and create value for our customers.
pairs.zh:
但我非常高兴我们能够与这些人合作，为客户创造价值。

But I feel very happy about our ability to work with these folks and create value for our customers.

Thank you. Thank you and congrats on a very productive first year.

Thank you for your question. Next question comes from the line of Kash Rangan with Goldman Sachs. Your line is now open.

pairs.en: Matt Martino--Goldman Sachs -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Matt Martino--高盛--分析师

Matt Martino--Goldman Sachs -- Analyst

pairs.en: Hey, thanks for taking my question. This is Matt Martino on for Kash Rangan. Sridhar, one for you. I know Snowflake is recently coming off their sales kickoff.
pairs.zh:
嘿，谢谢您回答我的问题。我是Matt Martino，替Kash Rangan提问。Sridhar，这个问题问您。我知道Snowflake最近刚结束他们的销售启动会。

Hey, thanks for taking my question. This is Matt Martino on for Kash Rangan. Sridhar, one for you. I know Snowflake is recently coming off their sales kickoff.

pairs.en: So, it would just be great to get some of your takeaways from the event and kind of what the key message was to the sales force, whether it's around prosecuting new use cases or pushing some of the newer products Snowflake is bringing to market? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
所以，如果能听听您对这次活动的一些见解，以及向销售团队传递的关键信息——无论是关于开拓新用例，还是推广Snowflake即将上市的新产品——那就太好了。谢谢。

So, it would just be great to get some of your takeaways from the event and kind of what the key message was to the sales force, whether it's around prosecuting new use cases or pushing some of the newer products Snowflake is bringing to market? Thank you.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: As you folks know, sales kickoff is about unifying around a common message, a common team a sense of purpose. I think I found the enthusiasm among the folks to be infectious. I think it was very good. I can't obviously attend like all of the meetings.
pairs.zh:
如各位所知，销售启动会议的核心在于围绕统一的信息、统一的团队和目标感凝聚共识。我觉得大家表现出的热情很有感染力。整体效果非常好。显然我无法参加所有会议。

As you folks know, sales kickoff is about unifying around a common message, a common team a sense of purpose. I think I found the enthusiasm among the folks to be infectious. I think it was very good. I can't obviously attend like all of the meetings.

pairs.en: They're all in parallel. I looked at some of the material. I think the level of sophistication that our leaders are bringing to how they take care of business where they find out what do exemplary essays to and how do we hold them as a role model for others and how we thoughtfully add on new products. As I said, we are at a place where it's pretty unreasonable for anyone to expect that they're not going to know everything that Snowflake does.
pairs.zh:
它们都是并行的。我看了部分资料。我认为我们的领导者们处理业务的方式非常成熟，他们会找出哪些是值得效仿的范例，如何将其树立为其他人的榜样，以及如何深思熟虑地添加新产品。正如我所说，现在我们处于这样一个阶段：任何人想要声称自己不了解Snowflake所做的一切，都是相当不合理的。

They're all in parallel. I looked at some of the material. I think the level of sophistication that our leaders are bringing to how they take care of business where they find out what do exemplary essays to and how we hold them as a role model for others and how we thoughtfully add on new products. As I said, we are at a place where it's pretty unreasonable for anyone to expect that they're not going to know everything that Snowflake does.

pairs.en: So, we've introduced things like colleges. These are essentially constructs within Snowflake cross-specialization in different areas, so that somebody that wants to become an expert in machine learning within a particular pod can sign up, become that expert and serve as a point of contact for that particular pad. So, what I would say I saw was this sort of sophistication and confidence in being able to take our product to market. And of course, there's a lot of how do we do right by the customer, what creates value for them, how do we work with them, that was also front-end center.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们引入了类似colleges这样的机制。这些本质上是在Snowflake内部跨不同专业领域构建的体系，让那些想在特定pod中成为机器学习专家的人可以报名，成为专家并作为该特定pad的联络人。所以，我要说的是，我看到了这种在产品推向市场时的成熟与自信。当然，很多内容也围绕如何以客户为中心、如何为他们创造价值、如何与他们合作展开，这些都是核心重点。

So, we've introduced things like colleges. These are essentially constructs within Snowflake cross-specialization in different areas, so that somebody that wants to become an expert in machine learning within a particular pod can sign up, become that expert and serve as a point of contact for that particular pad. So, what I would say I saw was this sort of sophistication and confidence in being able to take our product to market. And of course, there's a lot of how do we do right by the customer, what creates value for them, how do we work with them, that was also front-end center.

pairs.en: But these folks are also there. Anything else to add, Mike, Christian?
pairs.zh:
但这些人也在这里。还有要补充的吗，Mike，Christian？

But these folks are also there. Anything else to add, Mike, Christian?

pairs.en: Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product
pairs.zh:
Christian Kleinerman--产品执行副总裁  

Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product

pairs.en: Lots of excitement for our product lineup and what's coming. We'll share more at Summit.
pairs.zh:
我们的产品阵容和即将推出的产品备受期待。我们将在Summit上分享更多信息。

Lots of excitement for our product lineup and what's coming. We'll share more at Summit.

pairs.en: Matt Martino--Goldman Sachs -- Analyst
pairs.zh:
Matt Martino--高盛--分析师

Matt Martino--Goldman Sachs -- Analyst

pairs.en: Thanks a lot. Appreciate your thoughts.
pairs.zh:
非常感谢。感谢你的想法。

Thanks a lot. Appreciate your thoughts.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.zh:

pairs.en: Thank you for your question. Final question is from the line of Joel Fishbein with Truist Securities. Your line is now open.
pairs.zh:
感谢您的提问。最后一个问题来自Truist Securities的Joel Fishbein，请提问。

Thank you for your question. Final question is from the line of Joel Fishbein with Truist Securities. Your line is now open.

pairs.en: Joel Fishbein--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Joel Fishbein--分析师  
Joel Fishbein--Analyst

pairs.en: Thanks for taking the question. I guess it's a two-part. One for Sridhar and one for Mike, but same topic. Mike, you had an expansion with your partnership with Microsoft and relates to Open AI.
pairs.zh:
感谢提问。我想这个问题分为两部分，一部分是给Sridhar的，一部分是给Mike的，但主题相同。Mike，你与Microsoft的合作伙伴关系有所扩展，并且涉及Open AI。

Thanks for taking the question. I guess it's a two-part. One for Sridhar and one for Mike, but same topic. Mike, you had an expansion with your partnership with Microsoft and relates to Open AI.

pairs.en: I would love to just get a little more granular about what that means for you guys for Snowflake. And Mike, if you can potentially quantify what that could mean from a revenue standpoint in the future? Thanks.
pairs.zh:
我想更详细地了解一下这对你们Snowflake意味着什么。Mike，你是否可以从收入角度量化这未来可能意味着什么？谢谢。

I would love to just get a little more granular about what that means for you guys for Snowflake. And Mike, if you can potentially quantify what that could mean from a revenue standpoint in the future? Thanks.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: I'll start, and Christian should add. We have a broad and deep partnership with Microsoft at the level of data, but also at the level of products where things that we create come out in Microsoft Copilot, come out in Teams. And so, I'm very happy with that partnership. We are increasingly going to market together in a number of situations.
pairs.zh:
我先开始，Christian随后补充。我们与Microsoft在数据层面有着广泛而深入的合作，同时也在产品层面合作——我们创造的内容出现在Microsoft Copilot和Teams中。因此，我对这一合作关系非常满意。我们正越来越多地在多种场景下共同进入市场。

I'll start, and Christian should add. We have a broad and deep partnership with Microsoft at the level of data, but also at the level of products where things that we create come out in Microsoft Copilot, come out in Teams. And so, I'm very happy with that partnership. We are increasingly going to market together in a number of situations.

pairs.en: And so, I think that is all hugely positive. What are the specifics of this partnership mean is that OpenAI models that effectively accessible within Snowflake security perimeter. And that's a highly technical definition. It is basically the guarantee that we make to our customers that their data is fully under our control.
pairs.zh:
所以，我认为这一切都非常积极。这一合作的具体意义在于，OpenAI模型能够在Snowflake安全边界内有效访问。这是一个高度技术性的定义，本质上是我们向客户做出的保证：他们的数据完全由我们掌控。

原文：
And so, I think that is all hugely positive. What are the specifics of this partnership mean is that OpenAI models that effectively accessible within Snowflake security perimeter. And that's a highly technical definition. It is basically the guarantee that we make to our customers that their data is fully under our control.

pairs.en: It's a big deal for our customers. I think what this means in practice is that every product that we make starting with simply having the model available in a model garden that we have, I use Anthropic all the time in one of our internal instances, that ability to have access to these world-class models to then build different kinds of chatbot, different kinds of agentic applications. And so, what this enables is for us and our customers is to be able to build world-class applications without having to have data go anywhere else without special licenses that are needed. It just means that like OpenAI models are available out of the box just like Anthropic models are available on AWS out of the box.
pairs.zh:
这对我们的客户来说意义重大。我认为这实际上意味着，我们制造的每一个产品，从简单地将模型提供在我们的model garden中开始——我在我们内部的一个实例中一直使用Anthropic——这种能够访问这些世界级模型的能力，然后构建不同类型的聊天机器人、不同类型的代理应用。因此，这使我们和我们的客户能够构建世界级的应用程序，而无需将数据传到其他地方，也无需特殊许可证。这仅仅意味着OpenAI模型可以开箱即用，就像Anthropic模型在AWS上开箱即用一样。

It's a big deal for our customers. I think what this means in practice is that every product that we make starting with simply having the model available in a model garden that we have, I use Anthropic all the time in one of our internal instances, that ability to have access to these world-class models to then build different kinds of chatbot, different kinds of agentic applications. And so, what this enables is for us and our customers is to be able to build world-class applications without having to have data go anywhere else without special licenses that are needed. It just means that like OpenAI models are available out of the box just like Anthropic models are available on AWS out of the box.

pairs.en: So, I think this is a pretty big deal for a lot of our customers. Christian, color on the overall partnership.
pairs.zh:
所以，我认为这对我们的很多客户来说是一件大事。Christian，谈谈整体合作情况。

So, I think this is a pretty big deal for a lot of our customers. Christian, color on the overall partnership.

pairs.en: Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product
pairs.zh:
Christian Kleinerman--产品执行副总裁  

Christian Kleinerman--Executive Vice President, Product

pairs.en: We're leveraging for our own products on top of that is in leveraging this model. So, it's good for our customers to use directly, but also for ourselves.
pairs.zh:
我们在此之上为自己的产品利用这一模型。因此，这对客户直接使用有利，也对我们自身有利。

We're leveraging for our own products on top of that is in leveraging this model. So, it's good for our customers to use directly, but also for ourselves.

pairs.en: Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer
pairs.zh:
Mike Scarpelli——首席财务官  
Mike Scarpelli--Chief Financial Officer

pairs.en: Yeah. And I'll just say, Joel, from a -- what is that impact going to be on our business. Obviously, we wouldn't do it if we didn't think it could be impactful to our business, but it's too early to say. And I would say that would be upside in our revenue once we see traction with that.
pairs.zh:
是的。我只想说，Joel，从对我们业务的影响来看——显然，如果我们不认为这会对我们的业务产生影响，我们也不会去做，但现在说还为时过早。我想说一旦我们看到这方面的进展，这将是我们收入的增长点。

原文：Yeah. And I'll just say, Joel, from a -- what is that impact going to be on our business. Obviously, we wouldn't do it if we didn't think it could be impactful to our business, but it's too early to say. And I would say that would be upside in our revenue once we see traction with that.

pairs.en: But it's going to take some time before we get this rolled out to customers.
pairs.zh:
但是，我们需要一些时间才能将其推广给客户。
But it's going to take some time before we get this rolled out to customers.

pairs.en: Joel Fishbein--Analyst
pairs.zh:
Joel Fishbein--分析师  
Joel Fishbein--Analyst

pairs.en: Thank you very much.
pairs.zh:
非常感谢。
Thank you very much.

pairs.en: Operator
pairs.zh:
操作员
Operator

pairs.en: Thank you for your question. There are no additional questions waiting at this time. So, I'll pass the call back to Sridhar for any closing remarks.
pairs.zh:
感谢您的提问。目前没有其他待处理的问题。因此，我将把通话交还给Sridhar做结束语。

Thank you for your question. There are no additional questions waiting at this time. So, I'll pass the call back to Sridhar for any closing remarks.

pairs.en: Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer
pairs.zh:
Sridhar Ramaswamy——首席执行官

Sridhar Ramaswamy--Chief Executive Officer

pairs.en: Thank you. In closing, think Snowflake stands to benefit enormously from the data and AI revolution that is sweeping the enterprise market. Our philosophy of an easy-to-use, fast-to-value efficient product makes us uniquely differentiated and much loved by our customers. 30% product revenue growth in fiscal '25, combined with our strong initial outlook for fiscal '26 think demonstrates our ability to execute that scale.
pairs.zh:
谢谢。最后，我认为Snowflake将极大受益于席卷企业市场的数据与AI革命。我们秉持易用、快速实现价值、高效的产品理念，这使我们独树一帜，深受客户喜爱。25财年产品收入增长30%，加上我们对26财年强劲的初步展望，展示了我们实现这一规模的能力。

Thank you. In closing, think Snowflake stands to benefit enormously from the data and AI revolution that is sweeping the enterprise market. Our philosophy of an easy-to-use, fast-to-value efficient product makes us uniquely differentiated and much loved by our customers. 30% product revenue growth in fiscal '25, combined with our strong initial outlook for fiscal '26 think demonstrates our ability to execute that scale.

pairs.en: And so, we are going to continue our strategy of driving high growth and efficiency. Our ability to release products and take them to market quickly is what enables high growth. Simultaneously generating more than $1 billion of adjusted free cash flow, expanding operating margin, and increasing SBC efficiency further demonstrate the strength of the business. I think the long-term profile of Snowflake is one that showcases durable growth and continued margin expansion, which I think is very unique.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们将继续执行推动高增长和效率的策略。我们快速发布产品并将其推向市场的能力是实现高增长的关键。同时，产生超过$1 billion的调整后自由现金流、扩大营业利润率、提高SBC效率，进一步证明了业务的实力。我认为Snowflake的长期形象是展现持久增长和持续利润率扩张，我认为这非常独特。

原文：
And so, we are going to continue our strategy of driving high growth and efficiency. Our ability to release products and take them to market quickly is what enables high growth. Simultaneously generating more than $1 billion of adjusted free cash flow, expanding operating margin, and increasing SBC efficiency further demonstrate the strength of the business. I think the long-term profile of Snowflake is one that showcases durable growth and continued margin expansion, which I think is very unique.

pairs.en: And this is really exciting, and I look forward to sharing more and more of our progress with all of you along the way. Thank you all for joining us.
pairs.zh:
这真的非常令人兴奋，我期待在接下来的旅程中与大家分享越来越多的进展。感谢各位的参与。

And this is really exciting, and I look forward to sharing more and more of our progress with all of you along the way. Thank you all for joining us.
